title: Mineverse mining snapshot — READ contract v1
description: Envelope the superbot bot side pushes into the read relay and the web app consumes via GET /api/snapshot. Contract prose: docs/mining-data-contract.md. Versioning: additive-only within v1 (new OPTIONAL fields update this file in place); any breaking change ships a new mining_snapshot.v2.schema.json.

schema_version.description: Contract major version. v1 is exactly the string "1" (const, not a pattern — additive changes do not bump it; breaking changes go to "2" in a new schema file).

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC instant the bot projected this snapshot. Consumers compare it to now for staleness.

guild_id.description: Discord guild snowflake the snapshot is scoped to, as a STRING (snowflakes exceed IEEE-754 double precision; JSON numbers would silently corrupt them in JS consumers).

max_depth.description: OPTIONAL world-shape hint: deepest reachable depth index. Oracle-confirmed depth bands are 0-3. Consumers must fall back gracefully when absent.

biomes.description: OPTIONAL world-shape hint: biome display name per depth index (index 0 = surface; oracle-confirmed bands 0-3, so at most 4 entries). Consumers must fall back gracefully when absent.

miners.description: One entry per mining_player_state row in the guild. May be empty.

countMap.description: Dynamic name -> non-negative integer count map (item/skill/structure names are open-ended strings owned by the oracle).

suid.description: Superbot user id (Discord user snowflake) as a string.

guild_id.description: Guild snowflake as a string; with suid forms the oracle's (suid, guild_id) player-state key. Matches the envelope guild_id in v1.

display_name.description: Guild display name resolved bot-side at projection time.

depth.description: Current depth index (0 = surface). Oracle-confirmed depth bands: 0-3.

record_depth.description: Deepest depth ever reached by this miner (same 0-3 bands).

position.description: Coordinates on the current depth's grid. PERMISSIVE beyond x/y: the oracle may add discovery/exploration fields additively.

energy.description: Energy meter. PERMISSIVE beyond the required pair: regen fields may arrive additively.

updated_at.description: Unix epoch seconds of the last energy recalculation.

coins.description: Coin balance (economy_service is the only mutator bot-side).

xp.description: XP projection from game_xp_service. PERMISSIVE beyond the required quartet.

equipment.description: Slot name -> equipped item name map. Slot names are the oracle-confirmed closed set (tool, light, charm, weapon, shield, helmet, chestplate, leggings, boots); item names stay open-ended strings.

gear_wear.description: Dynamic item name -> accumulated wear map for equipped gear.

mining_inventory.description: Dynamic item name -> quantity map: what the miner carries underground.

vault.description: Dynamic item name -> quantity map: banked items.
